detectors.description:

	External calls:
	- transferQuantity = transferToApprove.quantity() (KinesisVelocityToken.sol#951)
	- deliveryAddress = transferToApprove.targetAddress() (KinesisVelocityToken.sol#953)
	- requesterAddress = transferToApprove.requesterAddress() (KinesisVelocityToken.sol#955)
	- transferToApprove.approveTransfer() (KinesisVelocityToken.sol#963)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _transfer(deliveryAddress,owner,transferQuantity) (KinesisVelocityToken.sol#965)
		- balances[_from] = balances[_from].sub(_value) (KinesisVelocityToken.sol#865)
		- balances[_to] = balances[_to].add(_value) (KinesisVelocityToken.sol#867)
